curriculum_title: BBF Lab 90-Day Language Mastery: 10-Lesson Pimsleur-Style Portuguese Audio Series

principles: Graduated Interval Recall (spaced repetition of target vocabulary over interval increments)
Principle of Anticipation (systematic pauses requiring active student recall prior to native correction)
Back-Chaining Pronunciation (deconstructing syllables from the end of a word to isolate accent contours)

lessons.title: First Encounters & Standard Greetings
lessons.description: Master basic greetings, introductions, and country of origin identification in Brazilian Portuguese.
objectives: Greet someone in the morning
State your name and ask for someone else's name
Inquire about nationality and state your own

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Welcome to the BBF Lab 90-Day Language Mastery Series. Today, we will learn how to greet someone and introduce yourself in Brazilian Portuguese. Let's start with 'Good morning'. Listen only.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now, let's break it down from the end. Repeat after the native speaker.

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: How do you say: Good morning?

dialogue_flow.speaker: narrator
dialogue_flow.text: Now, ask the person for their name. 'What is your name?'

lessons.title: Simple Connections & Gym Greetings
lessons.description: Establish basic gym interactions, ask training partners how they are, and learn key locational phrases.
objectives: Ask how someone is doing in an athletic environment
Locate basic gym features (restrooms, water fountain)
Identify local fitness coaching staff

lessons.title: Finding Your Way
lessons.description: Master navigation, blocks, directions (left, right, straight), and street addresses in Rio or São Paulo.
objectives: Ask for street directions
Navigate left, right, and straight ahead
Understand block-based routing explanations

lessons.title: Fueling Up — Café & Shakes
lessons.description: Order coffee, standard drinks, understand protein supplementation, and navigate ordering in a café or juice bar.
objectives: Order coffee and water under polite local protocols
Inquire about whey protein or nutritional additions
Politely request a receipt and pay

lessons.title: Shopping & Market Haggling
lessons.description: Master basic market negotiations, numbers 1-10, currency units, and financial transactions.
objectives: Negotiate prices at local open markets
Recognize and speak currency figures (Reais)
Count and identify items from 1 to 10

lessons.title: Telling Time & Daily Routines
lessons.description: Understand times of day, state schedules, monitor the intermittent fasting window, and say numbers up to 30.
objectives: Ask for and tell the time of day
Coordinate fitness schedules with training partners
Refer to intermittent fasting times

lessons.title: Gym Directions & Muscle Anatomy
lessons.description: Describe muscle groups, identify anatomical targets, and express physical sensations or injury/muscle pain areas.
objectives: Identify primary anatomy muscle groups
Communicate physical strain or target points to a client
Express location of muscle pain

lessons.title: Organizing the Workout
lessons.description: Learn weight increments, barbell metrics, and active training commands such as push, pull, and lift.
objectives: Command weight additions or setups
Instruct standard movements (push, pull, press)
Describe barbell loading weights in kilograms

lessons.title: Social Connections & Post-Workout Chat
lessons.description: Engage in friendly post-workout conversations, check in on progression targets, and arrange subsequent sessions.
objectives: Validate a training partner's output
Suggest future session times
Discuss post-workout plans

lessons.title: Street & Cultural Integration
lessons.description: Consolidate navigational, nutritional, and physical coaching dialogs for complete immersive capability.
objectives: Transition fluidly from greetings to direction-giving
Execute complex restaurant transactions with native confidence
Pitch athletic partnerships in natural Portuguese
